# TextCupid

> TextCupid is an AI matchmaker you text. You text a phone number, it gets to know you through conversation, and it introduces you to one genuinely compatible person at a time. No app, no swiping, no profiles. Live in St. Louis first.

TextCupid is the product and brand name. The legal entity is Cupid LLC. The matchmaker persona that talks to you by text introduces itself as "Cupid"; that name refers only to the in-product persona, never to the company or product, which is always called TextCupid.

TextCupid is not a dating app and does not date for you. Dating happens person to person. TextCupid makes the introduction and gets out of the way.

## What it is

- An AI matchmaker you reach by text message (SMS).
- One phone number to text: +1 (314) 377-7361.
- No app to download, no account, no swiping, no profiles, no photo grid.
- Live in St. Louis first, open to people who text from anywhere.

## How it works

1. You text the number and start a conversation.
2. It learns you over a few honest conversations: values, humor, dealbreakers, and what you are actually looking for.
3. When two people are genuinely compatible and both say yes, it sets up a private, time-limited, anonymous video date (15 minutes, first names only).
4. Numbers are exchanged only on mutual consent after the date.

## Pricing

Pay per introduction, not a subscription as the core model. Your first introduction is free.

- $29 for 1 introduction
- $69 for 3 introductions
- $149 for 8 introductions
- $99 per month for unlimited introductions

## Privacy

- Phone numbers are SHA-256 hashed, never stored in plaintext.
- Reverse lookups use AES-256-GCM encryption.
- Video rooms are anonymous, time-limited, and auto-deleted.
- Your name is shared exactly once, when you both consent.

## Famous for

- AI matchmaker you text
- Text-based dating (SMS dating, dating by text)
- Dating without apps
- An alternative to swiping
- Pay per introduction, a matchmaker you text
